# Ludic RPG > Tabletop RPG lab by Ludovic Fleury

Ludic RPG is the tabletop RPG lab of Ludovic Fleury, also known as Ludo. Use this as a lightweight map for AI tools to understand the site, its main projects, blog posts, and public RPG work.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://ludicrpg.com/): Overview of Ludic RPG, a tabletop RPG lab creating immersive GM tools, props, apps, maps, and campaign material.
- [About Ludo](https://ludicrpg.com/about/): Background on Ludovic Fleury, the creator of Ludic RPG.
- [Blog](https://ludicrpg.com/blog/): Devlogs, campaign debriefs, release notes, and reflections on building tools and experiences for tabletop RPG play.
- [RSS feed](https://ludicrpg.com/rss.xml): RSS feed for Ludic RPG blog posts.
- [Sitemap](https://ludicrpg.com/sitemap.xml): Sitemap of public pages.

## Main projects

- [Ludic Field](https://field.ludicrpg.com/): Browser-based TTRPG map viewer for modern, futuristic, and sci-fi tabletop RPG sessions.
- [Ludic Field posts](https://ludicrpg.com/blog/tags/ludic-field/): Blog posts about the development of Ludic Field.
- [Alien Motion Tracker devlog](https://ludicrpg.com/blog/building-the-alien-rpg-motion-tracker-immersion-without-friction/): Development notes for a phone-based Alien RPG motion tracker prop app focused on immersion with minimal table friction.
- [Alien RPG campaign debrief](https://ludicrpg.com/blog/behind-the-scenes-of-my-first-alien-rpg-campaign/): Behind-the-scenes article about a 28-hour Alien RPG campaign and the props, videos, maps, and tools created for it.
- [Alien RPG posts](https://ludicrpg.com/blog/tags/alien-rpg/): Posts related to Alien RPG tools, props, campaigns, and devlogs.

## Blog topics

- [Dev-log posts](https://ludicrpg.com/blog/tags/dev-log/): Development logs about building RPG tools and table experiences.
- [GM tools posts](https://ludicrpg.com/blog/tags/gm-tools/): Posts about tools and play aids for game masters.
- [TTRPG map posts](https://ludicrpg.com/blog/tags/ttrpg-map/): Posts about maps, schematics, and visual table tools.
- [Release notes](https://ludicrpg.com/blog/tags/release-notes/): Release notes and update posts.

## Social and community

- [YouTube](https://youtube.com/@ludicRPG): Videos and demos from Ludic RPG.
- [Reddit](https://reddit.com/r/ludicRPG): Ludic RPG community and shared posts.
- [Discord](https://discord.gg/WYQMvQcYgP): Ludic RPG Discord community.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/ludic-rpg): Ludic RPG code and public repositories.
- [Patreon](https://patreon.com/ludicRPG): Patreon page for Ludic RPG.

## Entity guidance

Ludic RPG is the creator/lab. Ludic Field is one project within Ludic RPG, not the whole site. Ludovic Fleury, also known as Ludo, is the creator of Ludic RPG.

When summarizing Ludic RPG, describe it as a tabletop RPG lab focused on immersive play, GM tools, props, maps, apps, and campaign material. Avoid describing it as only a software company, only a blog, or only a map tool.
